channel.title: Comments on: Weyerbacher Double Simcoe IPA – Episode 42
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Thanks Andy, I'm enjoying your site beeraday, as well! Thanks for checking us out and have fun with the rest of your journey!
item.content:encoded: Thanks Andy, I’m enjoying your site beeraday, as well! Thanks for checking us out and have fun with the rest of your journey!

item.title: By: Andy Murphy
item.dc:creator: Andy Murphy
item.description: Good discussion of the difference between IBU rating and the actual taste of a beer. Great site, and great video. Though I have to admit, putting that beer up to the camera and inviting us to take in the aroma was cruel... :-) Enjoying your vids, thanks guys!
item.content:encoded: Good discussion of the difference between IBU rating and the actual taste of a beer. Great site, and great video. Though I have to admit, putting that beer up to the camera and inviting us to take in the aroma was cruel… 🙂 Enjoying your vids, thanks guys!

item.title: By: Steve Matthews
item.dc:creator: Steve Matthews
item.description: Nothing goes better with your coffee early on Saturday morning than catching up on the Beer America TV episodes. As always, good stuff well presented. Good peeps, good beer. Simcoe IIPA? Hmmm. (lip smack, smack). Definitely a sipper, one of these and the yardwork is done for the day. Best wait until after you've trimmed the hedges and put up all the sharp\pointy tools. Yep, a trip to my favorite waterin hole will be in order sometime later today.
item.content:encoded: Nothing goes better with your coffee early on Saturday morning than catching up on the Beer America TV episodes. As always, good stuff well presented. Good peeps, good beer. Simcoe IIPA? Hmmm. (lip smack, smack). Definitely a sipper, one of these and the yardwork is done for the day. Best wait until after you’ve trimmed the hedges and put up all the sharp\pointy tools. Yep, a trip to my favorite waterin hole will be in order sometime later today.

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description:
I LOVE this beer! Simcoe is one of my favorite hops and this beer uses Simcoe exclusively, bittering, taste and aroma.
http://www.weyerbacher.com/cwo.php?id=7&page_id=46
item.content:encoded:
I LOVE this beer! Simcoe is one of my favorite hops and this beer uses Simcoe exclusively, bittering, taste and aroma.

http://www.weyerbacher.com/cwo.php?id=7&page_id=46

item.title: By: raisingheel
item.dc:creator: raisingheel
item.description: Good technical information, entertaining, and I learned something.
item.content:encoded: Good technical information, entertaining, and I learned something.
